title: JD Vance makes alarming UFO confession after 'obsessing' over unexplained sightings
description: Vice President and key Trump ally JD Vance has disclosed he is "obsessed" with aliens and believes unexplained UFO sightings are actually biblical demons.

title: Skeptical Missouri congressman on mission to crack open America's secret UFO bases
Skeptical Missouri congressman on mission to crack open America’s secret UFO bases
description: The Show Me State rep doesn't want to believe, he wants to see it with his own eyes.

title: If NASA has to keep investigating UFO claims, it should get more budget for that
description: If Congress is into aliens, NASA is into aliens — because you know who decides how NASA gets funded? Congress. Anyway, welcome to our new era of UFO studies.

title: 'Alien-obsessed' JD Vance believes UFO sightings are actually 'demons'
description: US Vice President JD Vance told a podcast host in the US that he thinks UFO sightings can be explained by "demons" and that they could be one of the "devil’s great tricks"
